violations.text: The quaternary ammonium concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was 0 parts per million (ppm). According to the manufacturer's use directions, the concentration of the quaternary ammonium must be 150-200 ppm. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2024
Single service items observed stored on the floor beneath shelf. Single service items must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2024
